title: The Rainbow Light Body
summary: The transformed state of 'life and immortality' Unimetrix 1 describes as the goal of the work.
markdown:
The **Rainbow Light Body** (also called the rainbow body or light-body) is the transformed
state that Unimetrix 1 names as the destination of its teachings — a condition it associates
with **life, health, and immortality**.

In the sessions Unimetrix 1 describes this transformation in biological terms: an
activation of latent capacities, a shift it sometimes frames as moving from "two and a half
helix" toward additional strands of DNA, and a body increasingly able to perceive and
operate across dimensions. It links the process to **light-body and "super-soldier"
training**, to the [Baramay](/lore/baramay/) upgrades it grants, and to disciplines of diet,
practice, and consciousness that let the physical form "catch up" to the change.

The Rainbow Light Body ties directly to the overall goal Unimetrix 1 states in the
[Five Rules](/lore/five-rules/) — *"Be immortal and be in health"* — and it appears on the
community's sites as the promised outcome of the path. It is the most frequently recurring
aspiration in the archive, invoked across sessions spanning the full range of years.
